codeReview.summary: Implementation matches VAL-INSTALL-001 requirements: package metadata now supports GitHub npm install (private flag removed), install lifecycle now auto-builds (prepare script), and distribution contents are constrained to compiled output (files whitelist). Added install-focused tests exercise metadata, packaging, and build lifecycle behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mors-worker skill scope appears outdated relative to actual mission usage: this feature used mors-worker for milestone distribution-install-ux, but SKILL.md says it is for core-foundation and local-cli-flows only.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/mors-worker/SKILL.md, section 'When to Use This Skill' vs feature milestone in mission features.json (distribution-install-ux).

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit 3f6fe94 diff, transcript skeleton, and skill guidance. The feature is correctly implemented and test-backed for GitHub npm install readiness; no blocking code issues found.
